channel.title: Andrii Lytvynenko - DevOps & Cloud Engineering Blog
channel.description: Articles on DevOps, Cloud Engineering, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, and infrastructure best practices.

image.title: Andrii Lytvynenko - DevOps & Cloud Engineering Blog

item.title: Building a DevOps Blog with Next.js and MDX
item.description: How I built a static blog into my portfolio using Next.js App Router, MDX, and GitHub Pages — with a path toward paid content.
item.author: a.v.lytvynenko2004@gmail.com (Andrii Lytvynenko)
